toast.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again in {seconds}s.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Access your secure trade dashboard

brand.description: Cross-border B2B marketplace with end-to-end encrypted checkout, RLS-protected order vault, and zero-trust API gateway.

security.headline: Security Operations Center
security.subhead: Live dashboard plus four hands-on labs — each action hits real middleware, APIs, or edge rules.

lab.title: Interactive labs
lab.subtitle: Safe demonstrations: every action writes to the same security_logs stream as the cards above.

bruteforce.heading: Brute-force defense
bruteforce.body: Sends six POST requests to /api/auth/login with invalid credentials. The first five are counted by the IP rate limiter; the sixth returns HTTP 429 and increments the Brute-force Attempt counter.
bruteforce.toastRateLimited: 429 received — rate limit and audit log fired.
bruteforce.toastFinished: Last status {last}. If you already hit the limiter, open this page again after the window resets.
bruteforce.toastError: Request failed — check the network console.

xss.heading: XSS blocking
xss.body: Opens a new tab with a query string containing a script tag. Edge middleware rejects the navigation (403) and logs an XSS Attack event.

password.heading: Password / bcrypt path
password.body: Submits email + password to Supabase Auth via /api/auth/login. Wrong credentials return 401 and enqueue Auth Failure in security_logs (passwords are never stored in plaintext; hashing is handled server-side).
password.hint: Use an address that does not exist if you only want to see the auth failure audit.
password.toastAuthFailureLogged: 401 — invalid credentials logged as Auth Failure.
password.toastRateLimited: 429 — you are rate limited; wait and retry.

injection.heading: Injection prevention
injection.body: POSTs a hostile productId to /api/security/injection-lab. Only P-#### IDs pass; anything else yields HTTP 422 with a Schema Validation log entry.
injection.hint: Try SQL fragments or wrong patterns, then attempt P-1001 to see a success path.
injection.toastBlocked: 422 — Zod rejected the payload; Schema Validation logged.

status.headline: Real-time module dashboard
status.subhead: Each card shows only: live status · interception count · crypto strength (no charts).

xss.title: XSS protection
xss.strength: Edge keyword regex + per-route Zod allowlist

password.title: Password security
password.strength: Bcrypt hashing & verification hosted by Supabase GoTrue (see password-security docs)

injection.title: Injection prevention
injection.strength: Supabase JS client only · 422s logged as Schema Validation · URL ids via Zod + parseInt

status.stale: DB unreachable - showing last known counters.
